title: FDIC Portfolio Surveillance
summary: Comprehensive portfolio-level FDIC surveillance workflow. Screens a defined universe of institutions, ranks them by emerging risk and relative health, and produces a decision-ready watchlist grouped into Escalate, Monitor, and No Immediate Concern tiers.

required.name: universe_definition
required.description: State (two-letter code), asset range, or explicit CERT list

optional.name: start_repdte
optional.description: Comparison start date for trend analysis

optional.name: ranking_emphasis
optional.description: Focus: capital, earnings, funding, growth, or overall

optional.name: limit
optional.description: Maximum institutions in the ranked watchlist

outputs.primary: Decision-ready watchlist with Escalate/Monitor/No Immediate Concern tiers and escalation drivers

steps.name: Universe Construction
steps.description: Build institution roster and derive date parameters

steps.name: Risk Screening and Ranking
steps.description: Parallel risk signals, peer health, and snapshot comparison

steps.name: Triage and Categorization
steps.description: Merge results and classify into Escalate/Monitor/No Immediate Concern

steps.name: Targeted Follow-Through
steps.description: Detailed analysis of top escalated institutions
